narrative:
Twinsburg 3-B (precinct in Summit County) has 1,007 registered voters, with 59.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
